reports.summary: API call failed after 3 retries. 'dict' object has no attribute 'model_dump' (52 occurrences)
reports.solution: MiniMax API returns raw dict instead of Pydantic model; downstream fallback handles it; known external issue

reports.summary: Lark: receive message loop exit, err: no close frame received or sent (1 occurrence)
reports.solution: WebSocket normal close by peer; platform-level behavior

reports.summary: Non-retryable client error: build_anthropic_kwargs() got an unexpected keyword argument 'drop_context_1m_beta' (11 occurrences)
reports.solution: Provider (MiniMax) does not support 'drop_context_1m_beta' parameter; external API compatibility issue

reports.summary: Another gateway instance is already running (PID 20894) (1 occurrence)
reports.solution: Operational issue — user had multiple gateway instances; closed error reappeared → accepted

reports.summary: Failed to edit message: HTTPSConnectionPool connection to open.feishu.cn timed out (1 occurrence)
reports.solution: Network timeout to Feishu API; transient network issue
